caption: Two men sit side-by-side in a room, positioned in front of a television and a shelf of media cases. The man on the left wears a grey t-shirt and maintains a neutral expression, while the man on the right, also in a grey t-shirt and wearing a necklace, rests his chin on his hand. Behind them, a glowing neon sign reads "OUR STUPID REACTIONS", though the first word is partially obscured in the first frame. A small screen is superimposed in the center of the shot, showing a dark scene. In the initial frame, this inset screen displays a dimly lit room with the caption "My life doesn't hold more value than my people." As the sequence progresses, the image in the inset screen shifts to a dark, shadowy environment where a creature-like figure appears to move. The two men remain still, watching the footage.
